roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BW ISSUED 070119, FILED

/CAL:RELEASE OF DEFENDANT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE #19019005,/CONTD:TO TRAIL #19019005/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X:DEFENDANT FOUND SUITABLE FOR THE COMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT,/OR/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 575 POLK ST ON 11-26-19FOR EVALUATION & ASSESSMENT AT 1:30 PM/SA2:MACY'S AT 170 O'FARRELL ST, SANFRANCISCO/CONTD:ASSESSMENT REPORT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET AND TO TRAIL 19013621/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/987,2//CONTD:TO SET AND TRAIL 19013621/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET, TRAILING #19019005/MO138572:19013621/CTORD:THAT THE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/
/CAL:STATUS OF 19019005/DAWT/X:19019005 WAS FILED IN DEPT 11/CONTD:TO TRAIL IN DEPT 11/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:5TH/X: 1 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
/CAL:MT TO RECALL BW/X:BENCH WARRANT REMAINS OUTSTANDING,  NO APPEARANCESBY DEFENDANT/
